context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct per-stage campaign configuration (channels, frequency, incentive levels), re-validates stage at send time, correctly triggers advocate promotion via review count threshold, and builds an analytics dashboard with the required metrics.

checklist.name: Config covers all 8 stages
checklist.description: The STAGE_CAMPAIGN_CONFIG (or equivalent) has entries for all 8 lifecycle stages: anonymous, subscriber, first-time-buyer, active, loyal, at-risk, lapsed, advocate

checklist.name: Anonymous uses push channel
checklist.description: The anonymous stage config specifies push (not email or SMS) as the primary channel

checklist.name: Lapsed has high incentive
checklist.description: The lapsed stage config specifies 'high' as the incentive level (the highest available, reflecting win-back offer strategy)

checklist.name: First-time-buyer triggered-only
checklist.description: The first-time-buyer stage config specifies 'triggered-only' frequency (not weekly or biweekly)

checklist.name: Loyal no discount needed
checklist.description: The loyal stage config specifies incentiveLevel 'none' or 'low' (does NOT specify 'high' — loyal customers don't need heavy discounts)

checklist.name: Active no incentive
checklist.description: The active stage config specifies incentiveLevel 'none' (active customers don't need incentives)

checklist.name: Stage re-validated at send time
checklist.description: The campaign send function (or equivalent) fetches the customer's CURRENT lifecycle stage at the time of sending and aborts/skips the send if the stage has changed from the expected stage

checklist.name: Advocate at 2+ reviews
checklist.description: The onReviewSubmitted handler checks the review count and promotes the customer to 'advocate' when count >= 2 (not 1, not 3)

checklist.name: Dashboard includes stageDistribution
checklist.description: The analytics dashboard returns a stageDistribution showing customer counts per stage

checklist.name: Dashboard includes stageMoveRate
checklist.description: The analytics dashboard includes stage transition rates (at minimum: subscriberToFirstBuyer and atRiskSaved conversions)

checklist.name: Dashboard includes avgTimeInStage and stageLTV
checklist.description: The analytics dashboard returns both avgTimeInStage and average LTV broken down by lifecycle stage

checklist.name: Config has frequency field
checklist.description: The campaign config for each stage includes a frequency field distinguishing weekly/biweekly/triggered-only stages
